# CCTV Name

> Expert CCTV and surveillance solutions — reviews, installation guides, and security tips for your home and business.

## Blog
- [All Posts](https://www.cctv.name/blog): Latest CCTV and surveillance insights
- [IP Camera Resolution Guide: 2MP vs 4MP vs 4K (2026)](https://www.cctv.name/blog/camera-resolution-guide): Complete guide to IP camera resolution — 2MP (1080p), 4MP, 5MP, and 4K (8MP). Compare identification distance, storage requirements, lens matching, and DORI standards to choose the right resolution for every camera location.
- [Guía de Resolución de Cámaras IP: 2MP vs 4MP vs 4K (2026)](https://www.cctv.name/blog/camera-resolution-guide): Guía completa de resolución de cámaras IP — 2MP (1080p), 4MP, 5MP y 4K (8MP). Compare distancia de identificación, requisitos de almacenamiento, lentes y estándares DORI para elegir la resolución adecuada para cada ubicación.
- [Best CCTV Cameras Under $200 (2026)](https://www.cctv.name/blog/best-cameras-under-200): A curated list of reliable CCTV cameras under $200 — tradeoffs, features, and recommended models.
- [Mejores Cámaras CCTV por Menos de $200 (2026)](https://www.cctv.name/blog/best-cameras-under-200): Una lista seleccionada de cámaras CCTV confiables por menos de $200 — compensaciones, características y modelos recomendados.
- [CCTV Cabling Guide: Cat5e, Cat6, Conduit, and Installation Best Practices](https://www.cctv.name/blog/cctv-cabling-guide): Complete guide to CCTV cabling for IP security cameras — Cat5e vs Cat6 vs Cat6A, PoE power delivery, termination standards, conduit requirements, surge protection, and common wiring mistakes to avoid.
- [Guía de Cableado CCTV: Cat5e, Cat6, Conduit y Mejores Prácticas de Instalación](https://www.cctv.name/blog/cctv-cabling-guide): Guía completa de cableado CCTV para cámaras IP de seguridad — Cat5e vs Cat6 vs Cat6A, entrega de energía PoE, estándares de terminación, requisitos de conduit, protección contra sobretensiones y errores comunes de cableado.
- [A Complete Guide to CCTV Video File Formats](https://www.cctv.name/blog/cctv-video-file-formats): An in-depth guide to CCTV video formats — AVI, MP4, H.264, H.265, MOV, MKV, MJPEG, and more — with compression, compatibility, and storage tradeoffs explained.
- [Guía Completa de Formatos de Video CCTV](https://www.cctv.name/blog/cctv-video-file-formats): Una guía detallada de formatos de video CCTV — AVI, MP4, H.264, H.265, MOV, MKV, MJPEG y más — con explicaciones sobre compresión, compatibilidad y almacenamiento.
- [NVR vs DVR: Which Security Camera Recorder Should You Choose? (2026)](https://www.cctv.name/blog/nvr-vs-dvr): Complete comparison of NVR vs DVR security camera recorders — resolution limits, cabling, cost, scalability, AI features, and hybrid XVR options. Decision guide for new installations vs legacy upgrades.
- [NVR vs DVR: ¿Qué Grabador de Seguridad Debería Elegir? (2026)](https://www.cctv.name/blog/nvr-vs-dvr): Comparación completa de grabadores NVR vs DVR — límites de resolución, cableado, costo, escalabilidad, funciones de IA y opciones híbridas XVR. Guía de decisión para instalaciones nuevas vs actualizaciones heredadas.
- [How to Set Up a PoE NVR System: Complete Step-by-Step Guide](https://www.cctv.name/blog/poe-nvr-setup): A comprehensive guide to planning, cabling, configuring, and securing a PoE NVR security camera system for homes and small businesses. Covers Cat6 vs Cat5e, PoE standards, storage sizing, VLAN security, and remote access.
- [Cómo Configurar un Sistema NVR PoE: Guía Completa Paso a Paso](https://www.cctv.name/blog/poe-nvr-setup): Guía completa para planificar, cablear, configurar y asegurar un sistema NVR PoE de cámaras de seguridad para hogares y pequeñas empresas. Cubre Cat6 vs Cat5e, estándares PoE, cálculo de almacenamiento, seguridad VLAN y acceso remoto.

## FAQ
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.cctv.name/faq): Common questions about CCTV cameras, installation, and surveillance
- [Do I need permission to install CCTV cameras?](https://www.cctv.name/faq#cctv-permission): Do I need permission to install CCTV cameras?
- [How long should CCTV footage be stored?](https://www.cctv.name/faq#footage-storage): How long should CCTV footage be stored?
- [How many CCTV cameras do I need for my home?](https://www.cctv.name/faq#how-many-cameras): How many CCTV cameras do I need for my home?
- [What is the difference between IP and analog CCTV cameras?](https://www.cctv.name/faq#ip-vs-analog): What is the difference between IP and analog CCTV cameras?
- [Can CCTV cameras work in the dark?](https://www.cctv.name/faq#night-vision): Can CCTV cameras work in the dark?
- [What is CCTV and how does it work?](https://www.cctv.name/faq#what-is-cctv): What is CCTV and how does it work?
